_comment: Pointer to the pre-built VectorAI DB snapshot teammates download instead of re-embedding from scratch. Bump `version` + rerun scripts/rebuild_snapshot.sh whenever the ingest pipeline (backend/schemas.py, backend/ingest/*, backend/embeddings.py, scripts/ingest_coaching.py) changes in a way that would alter what's indexed. `ingest_version` must match INGEST_VERSION in install.sh so the fetch script writes a marker that the seeding step will recognise as current.
description: routewise_crashes: ~140K FDOT crashes + 510 news articles (source=NEWS). routewise_coaching: 518 LLM-enriched crash lessons with three named dense vectors (lesson, incident, factors_text); all MiniLM-L6-v2 384-dim cosine.
